title: Section 3
content: Any rule, notification, proclamation and order issued, authority and power conferred, lease granted, right acquired, liability incurred, rent fixed, and any other thing done under any Act, Ordinance, Regulation or notification, or under any jagir or istimrar sanad, as the case may be, shall, in so far as it is not inconsistent with the provisions of this Act, be deemed to have been respectively issued, conferred, granted, acquired, incurred, fixed and done under this Act.
